overall_summary: The mapping correctly identifies CIS 1.1 and 6.6 as valid coverage matches (superset and subset respectively) for the information systems inventory requirement. It correctly excludes discovery tools (1.3-1.5) as prerequisites per Rule 9 and wrong artifact types (2.1, 5.1) per Rule 13, aligning with the specific Rule 9 examples provided in the system rules for this control phrasing.

per_mapping_verdicts.judge_note: Rationale correctly cites Rule 13 superset exception and Rule 3. Alignment with primary action (inventory maintenance) is precise.
Rationale correctly identifies typed system-level subset relationship under Rule 3. Cross-domain match is valid.
